title: eupatorium determinatum
intro: Eupatorium determinatum, also known as Boneset, is a perennial herb native to North America that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever and relieve body aches, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Eupatorium determinatum include its potential to ease symptoms of the common cold and flu, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Boneset can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
